about.title: About ToolsArena
about.metaTitle: About ToolsArena - Free Online Tools Platform
about.metaDescription: Learn about ToolsArena, a free online tools platform built for students, developers, and professionals. No signup required, 100% browser-based and private.
about.intro: ToolsArena is a free, all-in-one micro-tools platform built for students, developers, freelancers, and anyone who needs quick, reliable online utilities. We believe powerful tools should be accessible to everyone — no signup, no premium paywalls, no intrusive popups.
about.browserProcessing: Every tool on ToolsArena runs entirely in your browser. Your files, text, and data never leave your device and are never sent to our servers. This makes ToolsArena the most private online tools platform available.
about.missionText: To make every digital task simpler. Whether you need to compress an image for your blog, calculate your home loan EMI, format messy JSON, or generate a QR code for your business card — ToolsArena has you covered with fast, reliable, privacy-first tools.
about.whyFreeDesc: All tools are completely free with no hidden costs.
about.whyPrivacyDesc: All processing happens in your browser — nothing is uploaded.
about.whyNoSignupDesc: Use any tool instantly without creating an account.
about.whyFastDesc: Built with Next.js for lightning-fast performance.
about.whyIndiaDesc: Built with love in India for the global audience.
about.contactText: Have a suggestion for a new tool or found a bug? We'd love to hear from you.
about.founderBio: A passionate Software Engineer from Lucknow, India who built ToolsArena to make powerful digital tools accessible to everyone — for free. With a love for clean code and user-first design, Mukesh created this platform so students, developers, and professionals can get things done without signups, paywalls, or privacy concerns.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a suggestion, bug report, or partnership inquiry? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your request or suggestion in detail...
contact.successText: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24–48 hours.
contact.errorText: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms of service for ToolsArena. Read our usage terms and conditions.
terms.acceptanceText: By using ToolsArena, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.
terms.useOfServicesText: ToolsArena provides free online tools for personal and commercial use. You may not use our platform for: illegal activities, harassment, distributing malware, or any activity that violates applicable law.
terms.intellectualPropertyText: The ToolsArena name, logo, and website design are owned by ToolsArena. The open-source libraries used (Next.js, pdf-lib, etc.) are used under their respective licenses. QR codes generated with our tool are in the public domain.
terms.disclaimerText: ToolsArena tools are provided "as is" without warranty. We are not responsible for any data loss, incorrect calculations, or other issues arising from tool usage. Always verify critical calculations independently.
terms.limitationText: ToolsArena shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our tools.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of ToolsArena after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

guides.title: Guides & Tutorials
guides.subtitle: In-depth guides with pro tips, use cases, and reference tables
guides.heroDescription: In-depth, expert-written guides for every tool on ToolsArena. Discover pro tips, real-world use cases, reference tables, and step-by-step tutorials.
guides.tryDifferent: Try a different keyword like "PDF", "image", or "calculator"
guides.readyToTryDesc: Every guide links to a free, instant tool. No signup, no downloads, no hidden fees.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: ToolsArena privacy policy. Learn how we handle your data — all processing is done locally in your browser.
privacy.dataText: ToolsArena is designed with privacy as the first principle. We do not collect, store, or transmit any files, text, or personal data you use with our tools. All tool processing happens entirely in your browser using JavaScript.
privacy.analyticsText: We use Google Analytics 4 to collect anonymous usage statistics such as page views, device type, and geographic region. This helps us understand which tools are popular and improve our platform. No personally identifiable information is collected.
privacy.advertisingText: We display advertisements via Google AdSense. Google may use cookies to serve personalized ads based on your interests. You can opt out of personalized ads by visiting Google's Ad Settings.
privacy.cookiesText: We use minimal cookies: one for your theme preference (dark/light mode). Analytics and advertising cookies are set by Google. We do not use session cookies or tracking cookies for our own purposes.
privacy.thirdPartyText: Our website uses: Google Analytics (analytics), Google AdSense (ads), Google Fonts (typography). Each service has its own privacy policy governing their data practices.
privacy.contactText: For privacy concerns, contact us at privacy@toolsarena.in
